title: Orphan XAUUSD_h4_regimes.parquet (4668 labeled) not reproducible by build_all_regimes — no manifest/dossiers, batch skips XAU H4
why: data/regimes/XAUUSD_h4_regimes.parquet has 4668 labeled bars but build_all_regimes reports XAUUSD H4 skipped_insufficient_history (data/H4 XAUUSD_H4.csv has 7740 bars < 7760 floor). The parquet was generated from a longer H4 source (data/H4_extended? a 22y pull?) and is now an orphan: no _h4_manifest.json, no signals/regime_stats/XAUUSD H4 dossiers, and the batch cannot reproduce or refresh it. Latent inconsistency — a consumer could read a regime parquet that no current pipeline path produces.
value_rationale: Removes a non-reproducible artifact / decides the canonical XAU H4 data source; prevents silent reliance on an unmanaged parquet.
scope: Either point the H4 resolver at the longer source so the batch manages XAU H4, or remove the orphan parquet
Reconcile data/H4 vs data/H4_extended for XAU/XAG
recommendation: Investigate H4_extended as the intended XAU/XAG H4 source; if so, wire the resolver and let the batch own it; else remove the orphan.

history.reason: fix(regimes): B0067 remove orphan XAUUSD_h4_regimes.parquet (stale pre-burn-in config)

Removed orphan data/regimes/XAUUSD_h4_regimes.parquet. Provenance: 4668 labels from a pre-5y-burn-in labeler config (commit 7baeeee); current labeler yields 0 on the same 7740-bar CSV so the batch skips XAU H4. No longer source exists. Spec documents it. 2026-05-28.
docs(spec): B0067 fix cross-ref to B0070 (dossier-path-frequency ticket)
chore(backlog): quiesce cross-session reconciliation + B0079 prereq + B0068 done
